---
title: "CV"
pagetitle: "CV — Hugo Trad"
description: "Curriculum vitae of Hugo Trad."
lang: en
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/en/cv">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="fr" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/fr/cv">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="ar" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/ar/cv">
---

```{=html}
<nav class="langswitch" aria-label="Language">
  <a href="../en/cv.html" class="is-active">EN</a>
  <a href="../fr/cv.html">FR</a>
  <a href="../ar/cv.html">AR</a>
</nav>

<main class="content content--inner">
  <header class="site-header">
    <a href="index.html" class="site-header__brand">Hugo Trad</a>
    <nav class="site-header__nav">
      <a href="research.html">Research</a>
      <a href="projects.html">Projects</a>
      <a href="teaching.html">Teaching</a>
      <a href="cv.html" class="is-active">CV</a>
    </nav>
  </header>

  <article class="inner">
    <h1 class="inner__title">Curriculum Vitae</h1>
    <p class="inner__lede">A condensed timeline. Full PDF available on request — please email for the latest version.</p>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Positions</h2>
      <ul class="timeline">
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2025 —</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Assistant Professor of Behavioural Science &amp; Organizational Behavior</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">Africa Business School · Université Mohammed VI Polytechnique · Rabat</span>
          </div>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2024 —</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Methodology collaborator</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">OECD Behavioural Insights · informal</span>
          </div>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Education</h2>
      <ul class="timeline">
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2024</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>PhD, Cognitive Science</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">Institut Jean Nicod · École normale supérieure (PSL) · Paris</span>
            <span class="timeline__sub"><em>The War on Sludge: Uncovering the Cognitive Roots of Administrative Complexity</em></span>
          </div>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">—</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>MSc, Cognitive Science (Cogmaster)</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">ENS · EHESS · Université Paris Cité</span>
          </div>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Selected service</h2>
      <ul class="timeline">
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2024 —</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Methodology consultant</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">OECD · sludge audit framework</span>
          </div>
        </li>
        <li>
          <span class="timeline__date">2024 —</span>
          <div class="timeline__body">
            <strong>Behavioural-science consulting</strong>
            <span class="timeline__sub">National agencies and private-sector engagements (selected; details on request)</span>
          </div>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>

    <p style="font-family:var(--sans);font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:48px;">Full CV will be published as PDF — placeholder until you provide the file.</p>
  </article>
</main>
```
